channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Supreme Court upholds a Biden-era rule regulating ghost guns
item.description: The court says ghost guns, which are virtually untraceable weapons that require assembly, are considered "firearms" and subject to ATF regulation.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Trump says Signal chat isn't 'really an FBI thing.' The FBI has a long history of such inquiries
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — FBI Director Kash Patel was not part of a Signal chat in which other Trump administration national security officials discussed detailed attack plans, but that didn't spare him from being questioned by lawmakers this week about whether the nation's premier law enforcement agency wo
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anti-abortion groups mount effort to strip Planned Parenthood funding ahead of Supreme Court hearing
item.description: Major anti-abortion groups are gathering in the nation's capital to begin a lobbying effort with Congress and President Donald Trump’s administration aimed at eliminating funding for Planned Parenthood.
item.dc:creator: Christine Fernando, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump administration revokes state and local health funding
item.description: The Department of Health and Human Services is canceling tens of billions of dollars in federal grants that state and local health departments were using to track infectious diseases, health disparities, vaccinations, mental health services, and other health issues.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Appeals court won't lift order that barred Trump administration from deportations under wartime law
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal appeals court refused Wednesday to lift an order barring the Trump administration from deporting Venezuelan migrants to El Salvador under an 18th century wartime law. A split three-judge panel of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DOGE slashes billions more in expenses for programs like Peruvian climate change and gender equity in Mexico
item.description: DOGE announced it slashed 113 contracts valued at $4.7 billion for $3.3 billion in savings for programs like climate change in Peru and gender equity in Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What we know about Minnesota’s government employee return to office plan
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz has directed workers to report to offices or job sites at least 50 percent of the time beginning in June. Employee unions are pushing back.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, Clay Masters, and Peter Cox, MPR News

item.title: Democrats take hope from upset win in a GOP-leaning Pennsylvania state Senate district
item.description: MANHEIM, Pa. (AP) — Democrat James Andrew Malone narrowly won a special election for a Pennsylvania state Senate seat in Republican-leaning suburbs and farming communities, scoring an upset for a party roiled by infighting since President Donald Trump’s victory.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Congressional Republicans target PBS, NPR funding in contentious hearing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A House Republican pushing the Trump administration's government efficiency efforts called for dismantling and defunding the nation's public broadcasting system following a contentious hearing Wednesday featuring the heads of PBS and NPR.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYC mayoral poll: Cuomo grows lead, Mamdani gains traction
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is still holding onto the lead in the New York City mayoral race – but one other candidate is also gaining support, according to new exclusive polling conducted by PIX11 News in partnership with Emerson College and The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Grace Gomez, PIX 11

item.title: Florida lawmakers defy DeSantis in rift over state budget
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Once floated as the heir to Donald Trump’s GOP, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is used to getting his way in Tallahassee. He has wielded power like no other governor in the state’s recent history and enjoys a Republican supermajority in both chambers.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Appeals court blocks Trump admin's deportation flights in Alien Enemies Act immigration suit
item.description: A federal appeals court issued a decision in a high-profile immigration case challenging the Trump administration's authority to deport Venezuelan nationals via a 1798 wartime law.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NRA legislative expert says gun rights could see 'most monumental' win in Congress since 2005
item.description: Two major gun rights bills are currently advancing their way through Congress, including legislation seeking to create nationwide reciprocity for concealed carry permits, something the NRA says would be the "most monumental" win for Second Amendment rights in over 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Atlantic releases the Signal chat showing Hegseth's detailed attack plans against the Houthis
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Atlantic on Wednesday released the entire Signal chat among senior national security officials, showing that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth provided the exact timings of warplane launches and when bombs would drop — before the men and women flying those attacks against Yemen’s
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NPR, PBS defend their 'essential' need during heated DOGE hearing
item.description: At stake were potential cost cuts for both companies, which are partially funded by the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Trump orders declassification of FBI’s Russia investigation
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday signed a memorandum directing the declassification of FBI files related to the investigation into his 2016 campaign's potential ties to Russia.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: The inside story of how a journalist was sent White House war plans
item.description: Jeffrey Goldberg, the editor of The Atlantic, said he was mistakenly added to a group chat with U.S. national security leaders about imminent military strikes on Yemen.
item.dc:creator: Erika Ryan, Ailsa Chang, Christopher Intagliata, and Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Trump defends Waltz after Signal breach
item.description: President Trump said he still has confidence in national security adviser Mike Waltz in an interview with NBC on Tuesday, following a report by a journalist for The Atlantic who says he was included in a text message chain with officials about plans for an attack on Houthi rebels.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Another poll puts NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani in 2nd place
item.description: Editor's note: The video above originally aired on Feb. 28. NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) -- With the New York City mayor's race heating up, Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani is polling ahead of Mayor Eric Adams, according to a poll by Honan Strategy Group.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Judge contends Nazis got more due process than Trump deportees did
item.description: The fight over the rarely used wartime power has become central to Trump’s immigration crackdown agenda and his efforts to stretch the powers of the executive branch.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo, MPR News

item.title: After ‘incredibly unusual’ start, Minnesota lawmakers just want to get back to normal
item.description: The 70 days since the legislative session started have seen a variety of twists and turns that have left three seats open at various points in time. Now, leaders hope for a boring phase ahead.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Florida Lawmakers advance legislation to lower the gun-buying age
item.description: For years, lawmakers have tried to overturn a Florida law banning individuals under 21 from buying guns.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sen. Sanders at North Las Vegas rally says GOP, Dems out of touch with working families
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) -- Vermont Independent Sen. Bernie Sanders and Democratic Rep. New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez held a rally Thursday in North Las Vegas, calling for a new way to defeat President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Peguero, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge temporarily blocks DOGE access to Social Security records
item.description: A federal judge in Maryland on Thursday temporarily blocked the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) from accessing millions of Americans’ personal data stored by the Social Security Administration (SSA). In a scathing, 137-page opinion, U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Florida bill could raise highway speed limits
item.description: Highway speeds in Florida could be raised if a new bill passes through the Florida Legislature and makes it to the governor's desk.
item.dc:creator: Katlyn Fernandez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Republicans want Musk to shut up about Social Security
item.description: Senate Republicans want Elon Musk to stop talking about Social Security, and the Department of Government Efficiency to leave it alone.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5
